g.text: ENTITY DESTRUCTION CASCADE - COMPONENT CLEANUP SEQUENCE

div.p: Maintaining contiguous memory in Sparse Sets is critical for cache-friendly iteration (SIMD).

tr.td: Index of the component in the data array

ol.li: Swap: Copy the last element in the dense array into the position of the deleted element.
Remap: Update the sparse index of the moved element to point to its new dense location.
Pop: Decrement the dense array length by 1.
Result: Array remains contiguous; no fragmentation (0% padding).

div.p: Invariant: Handle is valid only if handle.gen == generations[handle.index].
